items.description: Internal candidate baseline is preserved and remains the rollback target.
Public manifest target shape is defined as a contract, not yet applied.
Content script narrowing or user-granted origin strategy is defined.
Store disclosure plan is ready but final store text requires future review.
Regression QA plan is defined and must run after any patch.

recommendedNextMilestone: M661-M663 Public Manifest Variant Patch + Host Permissions Narrowing + Regression QA
